## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `python3 -m unittest discover -s scripts -t . -p 'test_*.py'`
- [ ] `python3 scripts/token_usage.py health --format json`
- [ ] updated docs if user-facing behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] kept `local-first`, `exact-first`, and `source-first`
- [ ] added or updated tests
- [ ] redacted secrets and private local data
- [ ] updated `README.md` and `SKILL.md` when entry behavior changed
